_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic Patterns of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor (MPNST) Evolution Correlate with Clinical Outcome and Are Detectable in Cell-Free DNA.

_contextSnippet: Differential expression analysis between both groups revealed a strong downregulation of genes related to adaptive immunity among a subcategory of MPNSTs
details: Revealed strong downregulation of genes related to adaptive immunity and decreased expression of granzymes (GZMA, GZMK, and GZMH) and immune checkpoints (PD-L1 and HAVCR2) in H3K27me3 loss tumors
